title: Change all subitems owners when using "subitem owner" column
excerpt: When using the “Subitem owner” column, add ability to change all subitems owner instead of one by one. (for items with many subitems).

posts.author: kkyrrolla (Kyle Robert Lawson)
posts.cookedHtml: When using the “Subitem owner” column, add ability to change all subitems owner instead of one by one. (for items with many subitems).

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kyle!

If I am understanding correctly, are you able to achieve this using our batch actions feature? You should be able to select the specific subitems (using the shift key) and make bulk changes at once!

Let me know
